change_comments.message:
Problem is here: [ERROR] Failed to execute goal org.apache.maven.plugins:maven-dependency-plugin:3.0.2:unpack (unpack dgs) on project sanity-test-app: Unable to find/resolve artifact. Failed to read artifact descriptor for org.onap.sdnc.oam:platform-logic-installer:zip:3.1.0-SNAPSHOT: The following artifacts could not be resolved: org.onap.ccsdk.parent:odlparent-lite:pom:3.1.0-SNAPSHOT (absent): Could not find artifact org.onap.ccsdk.parent:odlparent-lite:pom:3.1.0-SNAPSHOT in snapshots

- odlparent-lite is in the meantime a 3.1.0 release version.
- actual snapshot is 3.1.2-SNAPSHOT
